summary: Global Localization Engine testing completed successfully. All 8 EU countries (UK, SI, DE, FR, ES, IT, PT, NL) are supported with correct currency symbols (£ for UK, € for others) and language translations. Country selection persists to localStorage and language changes dynamically when country is selected.
critical_code_review_comments: LocalizationContext.jsx: Well-structured context with proper memoization using useCallback for formatPrice, getCurrencySymbol, getVatRate, calculateWithVat
countryConfig.js: Comprehensive country configuration with all required fields (currency, currencySymbol, language, vatRate, taxLabel, vatLabel, etc.)
CountrySelector.jsx: Proper use of data-testid attributes for testing, clean dropdown implementation
BusinessSettings.jsx: Note - Uses its own country dropdown in Business Information section which is separate from global CountrySelector. This is intentional for business-specific settings.
i18n/config.js: All 8 language files properly configured with fallback to English
seed_data_creation: Created test provider and client accounts for localization testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global Localization Engine fully tested. All features working: CountrySelector shows 8 EU countries, currency symbols update correctly (£ for UK, € for EUR countries), language changes dynamically (tested EN, SL, DE, FR), localStorage persistence works, browser locale detection defaults to UK/English.

tests_performed.CountrySelector_renders_8_countries: PASS - All 8 countries visible with flags and currency symbols
tests_performed.country_change_updates_currency_globally: PASS - Tested UK (£) and EUR countries (€) in Provider Dashboard
tests_performed.language_changes_with_country: PASS - Tested Slovenian, German, French translations
tests_performed.localStorage_persistence: PASS - Country selection persists after page reload
tests_performed.browser_locale_detection: PASS - Defaults to UK/English when localStorage is empty
tests_performed.provider_dashboard_currency: PASS - Monthly Income shows correct currency symbol
tests_performed.client_portal_currency: PASS - CountrySelector works in Client Portal header
tests_performed.business_settings_tax_info: PASS - Shows country-specific tax labels (Davčna številka for SI, UTR for UK, etc.)

feature_verification.CountrySelector_component: Working - Shows all 8 EU countries with flags and currency symbols
feature_verification.language_auto_change: Working - UI language changes when country is selected
